evals.prompt: Write a Solidity staking contract where users can stake an ERC-20 token and earn rewards proportional to their stake duration and amount. Include deposit, withdraw, and claimRewards functions. The contract should use a reward-per-token accumulator pattern (like Synthetix). Use Solidity 0.8.28 and OpenZeppelin. Include a Foundry test file with fuzz tests.
evals.expected_output: A secure, gas-optimized staking contract with CEI pattern, custom errors, proper access control, and comprehensive Foundry tests including fuzz tests. Should use the reward-per-token accumulator pattern.

Should identify: (1) reentrancy in withdraw and withdrawAll (state updated after external call), (2) tx.origin usage in onlyOwner (phishing attack), (3) string reverts should be custom errors, (4) missing events, (5) no receive/fallback, (6) emergencyWithdraw drains all user funds, (7) missing pause check on withdrawAll. Should provide fixed code.

Should identify inflation attack / donation attack: attacker front-runs first depositor by depositing 1 wei, then donating large amount to vault, inflating share price. Should explain the attack vector clearly. Should recommend: (1) virtual offset (add 1 to numerator and denominator), (2) dead shares / initial deposit lockup, (3) minimum deposit requirements. Should provide fixed code implementing the virtual offset pattern (OpenZeppelin's approach).
